claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Zapier gives teams one place to set guardrails, manage model access, and see everything — so everyone can build with AI confidently, on any model, without waiting for permission.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: "Use Zapier's Workflow API and 8,000 integrations to power a built-in automation experience, integration marketplace, or AI workflows."

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "Zapier handles auth, infrastructure, and support, so you can move fast, at enterprise scale."
